hero.title: A tranquil mind, a peaceful soul.
hero.subtitle: Savor the taste of original coffee amid the lush greenery of a miniature tropical garden.

featured.name: Signature Latte
featured.desc: A perfect blend of premium Arabica beans and silky fresh milk.

items.name: Salted Coffee
items.desc: The creamy richness of cream and a hint of sea salt blend with deep, bold bitterness.

items.name: Orange Lemongrass Cold Brew
items.desc: Cool and refreshing, perfect for a sweltering afternoon.

items.name: Peach Orange Lemongrass Tea
items.desc: A traditional favorite with crisp, sweet peach pieces and fragrant lemongrass.

items.name: Butter Croissant
items.desc: Rich with buttery aroma, flaky and light, baked fresh daily.

testimonials.title: What Our Guests Say
testimonials.subtitle: Genuine reflections from the community who love Garden Sanctuary.

items.quote: A truly distinct space in the heart of Saigon. I often come here early in the morning to read — it's peaceful and calming.
items.name: Linh Chi

items.quote: The salted coffee here is the best I've ever had. Plus, every corner is photo-worthy — the shots come out artistic and elegant.
items.name: Minh Nhat

items.quote: The service is so attentive — staff always greet you with a smile and give thoughtful recommendations. A wonderful place to recharge after a long day.
items.name: Khanh Vy

contact.title: Connect With Us
contact.subtitle: Visit Garden Sanctuary's little garden to experience tranquility firsthand.
contact.address: 123 Nam Ky Khoi Nghia Street, District 1, HCMC
